188 Brhat SamhitV
To Jyesth5 belong great battle heroes, those who arc noted
for pedigree, wealth and fame, thieves, kings who are intent on
conquests and commandants.
^ uxw
Mula rules medicines, physicians, leaders of groups, those who
deal in flowers, roots and fruits, seeds, exceedingly wealthy persons
and those who live only on fruits and roots.
wM wtrnmrfm: i
Purv^sadha presides over people that are tender-hearted,
navigators, fishermen, aquatic animals etc., the truthful, pure and
wealthy, constructors of bridges, those who live by water, and
aquatic flowers and fruits.
TOTTOjtaT g^rr; nHM
Elephant drivers, wrestlers, elephants, horses, devotees of
Gods, immovable things like trees, warriors, persons enjoying plea-
sures, and men of valour—all these come under Uttarasadha.
^0%: WPKTT: iRoll
To Sravapa belong jugglers, the ever-active, the efficient,
the energetic, the righteous, devotees of Lord Visnu and the
truthful.
